videos.headline: Bison breaks tackles for 50-yard gain
videos.description: North Dakota State RB Ty Brooks turns a loss in the backfield into a 50-yard gain into the red zone.

videos.headline: Bison QB takes it himself for score
videos.description: North Dakota State QB Easton Stick takes it up the middle on a play-fake to put the Bison up 10-0 late in the first quarter.

videos.headline: QB Stick punches in 2nd TD on ground
videos.description: Bison QB Easton Stick runs in his second touchdown of the game to give North Dakota State a 17-3 lead.

videos.headline: Eastern Washington scores TD on fake field goal
videos.description: Holder Gunner Talkington backhands the ball to a lineman who dives into the end zone in the final seconds of the first half.

videos.headline: Stick throws dime over 3 defenders for TD
videos.description: QB Easton Stick scrambles out of the pocket, then throws a touchdown over a pile of defenders to Darrius Shepherd to put the Bison up 24-10.

videos.headline: Eastern Washington RB escapes for 75-yard score
videos.description: RB Sam McPherson finds a hole and makes men miss for a 75-yard touchdown to trim the Bison's lead to 24-17.

videos.headline: Stick heaves 78-yard TD to lengthen lead
videos.description: Easton Stick loads up and throws a long ball down the field to a wide-open Darrius Shepherd for a 78-yard score.

videos.headline: Stick ices championship on 46-yard TD run
videos.description: Easton Stick converts on a crucial 3rd-down and turns it into a 46-yard touchdown to ice the game and the FCS National Championship.
